subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath obeyed this servant of Thine through a command from Thy presence and hath journeyed in Thy path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی اطاع عبدک هذا بامر من عندک و سافر فی سبیلک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
